pr.title: Record: 9L MLP3x Full Stack + Custom Kernel Pipeline, val_bpb=1.1401

output.summary: 9-layer GQA transformer using SmearGate+BigramHash, Muon+SWA, NTK-RoPE, int6+zstd, and a custom Triton/CUDA kernel pipeline for fused ops.
techniques: Muon optimizer with SWA warmdown plus NTK-RoPE and muP scaling
SmearGate-driven blending with BigramHash features and int6+zstd-22 compression
Custom Triton/CUDA pipeline fusing RMSNorm/QKV, ReLU² MLP, and loss ops
